pr.title: chore: drop User.deposit_total (P1)
pr.body:
## Summary

Drops `User.deposit_total` — the admin-write-only "lifetime deposit aggregate". Its public read path was retired long ago when the profile's "Депозит" badge was repointed at `User.trust_deposit_balance` (the lock-in trust deposit), so the column has been a write-only orphan ever since.

Continental's `deposit_min` search filter was the last remaining reader; it is also removed since the column it filtered against no longer exists.

**Surfaces removed (all in lock-step):**

- `User.deposit_total` ORM column + Alembic drop migration (`c0a5e1f93b27_drop_users_deposit_total.py`, downgrade re-adds the column at `Numeric(28, 8)` default 0 — V5-E-1 documented).
- `AdminSetStatsIn.deposit_total` field + validator (server now rejects nothing — Pydantic silently drops the unknown key; the response no longer carries the field).
- `AdminUserListItem.deposit_total` / `AdminUserDetailOut.deposit_total`.
- `AdminListUsersQuery sort="deposit"` option on both server and client (the query-param `Literal` was narrowed).
- `GET /api/users?deposit_min=N` filter on `routers/users.py`.
- `SearchFilterSheet` "Депозит" section + `ActiveFilterChips` "Депозит от N" chip; `SearchFilters.deposit_min` field; `useUsers` / `UsersQueryKey` / `UsersQueryParams` cleaned up.
- `AdminUserDetailPage` "Лайфтайм-депозит" Detail row + `StatsSection.deposit_total` field; `AdminUsersPage` list row "Депозит $X" label switched to "Траст $X" (the trust deposit).
- `bot.texts.profile_summary` and `bot.sections.profile` banner now source the deposit value from `trust_deposit_balance`.

Generated `frontend/openapi.json` + `src/api/openapi.generated.ts` re-dumped from the live FastAPI schema so the contract-drift CI gate stays green.

Tests updated for the new shape; backend (780) + frontend (495) suites pass locally. `pyright backend/app` reports 0 errors.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

🟡 yellow — schema-level migration touches a column with admin-side writes, but the read path is already cut over.

- [ ] Run the new migration against a snapshot of production data and confirm the drop completes in seconds; `users` is the only unbounded table in the path so under `AccessExclusiveLock` the window should still be small.
- [ ] Eyeball the admin user list / detail screens in the running TMA: the `Сделок · ★ · Траст $X` row, the identity-card "Трастовый депозит" entry, and the Stats editor should all render — no JS errors from the removed `deposit_total` field.
- [ ] Verify the bot `/profile` DM still shows the deposit line correctly when a user has a non-zero `trust_deposit_balance` and the banner image renders.

### Notes

- The migration is V5-E-1 (irreversible data loss on downgrade) — the downgrade restores the column shape with `DEFAULT 0` but cannot reconstruct historical per-row aggregate values. Recovery requires a pre-cutover backup.
- Old TMA bundles that still send `&deposit_min=…` on `GET /api/users` will succeed silently (FastAPI ignores unknown query params); the filter is just a no-op now. No 4xx is raised.
- This is **P1** of the post-P9/P4-bis/P7/P4 batch (#226 merged). P2 (UserPicker in ReviewCreateSheet) and P3+P6 (admin Sheet TMA + broadcast composer UX) follow as separate PRs; P5+P10 (commission-via-invoice) is deferred per the user's instruction.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/28338854544f494a92c1a1e5b47d466d
Requested by: @g2void2-byte
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
